features: GIFT SET CONTENTS: Premium men's fragrance set featuring a 100ml eau de cologne and 150ml body wash in an elegant presentation box
MASCULINE FRAGRANCE: Visage Pour Homme combines sophisticated notes for a refined and distinctive masculine scent
DUAL PRODUCT VALUE: Complete grooming experience with matching fragranced cologne and body wash for lasting scent layering
LUXURIOUS PACKAGING: Sleek blue and silver design theme across both products, presented in a professional gift-ready box
PERFECT PRESENTATION: Ideal for special occasions or personal grooming, the set offers a coordinated fragrance experience
description: Product description Elevate your grooming routine with this sophisticated Visage Pour Homme gift set. The luxurious duo includes a 100ml eau cologne and a generous 150ml body wash, perfectly paired to create a lasting impression. The eau cologne offers a refined masculine fragrance, while the complementary body wash helps maintain the scent throughout your day. Presented in an elegant blue-themed gift box, this set makes for a thoughtful present or a premium addition to your personal care collection. The sleek, modern packaging design reflects the contemporary nature of the fragrance, whilst the deep blue gradient adds a touch of sophistication. Both products are conveniently sized for daily use or travel. Safety Warning do not eat
